title: SolverResult

attribute_balance_penalty.description: Penalty points for attribute balance violations

constraint_penalty.description: Total penalty points for constraint violations (unweighted for backwards compatibility)

effective_seed.description: Effective seed used for this run.

move_policy.description: Effective move policy used for this run.

no_improvement_count.description: Number of iterations without improvement at the end of the run

repetition_penalty.description: Penalty points for exceeding repeat encounter limits (unweighted for backwards compatibility)

stop_reason.description: Explicit stop reason for this run.

unique_contacts.description: Number of unique person-to-person contacts achieved

weighted_constraint_penalty.description: Weighted constraint penalty (actual penalty value used in cost calculation)

weighted_repetition_penalty.description: Weighted repetition penalty (actual penalty value used in cost calculation)

MoveFamily.description: Explicit move families supported by the simulated annealing search loop.

MoveFamilyBenchmarkTelemetrySummary.description: Benchmark telemetry grouped by move family.

MoveFamilyWeights.description: Explicit weights for each move family when `MoveSelectionMode::Weighted` is used.

MovePolicy.description: Controls which move families are allowed in a run and how the solver chooses between them.

allowed_families.description:
Optional allow-list of move families for this run.

When omitted, all move families are allowed.

forced_family.description:
Optional single-family override used for path tests and diagnostics.

When present, the search loop will only attempt the specified move family.

weights.description: Optional explicit family weights used when `mode` is `weighted`.

MoveSelectionMode.description: Selection mode for mixed move-family search.

oneOf.description:
Preserve the current solver behavior, where transfer / clique swap probabilities
are derived from the current state.
Use caller-provided explicit weights instead of the adaptive heuristics.

SolverBenchmarkTelemetry.description: End-of-run benchmark telemetry intended for regression / benchmark artifacts.

StopReason.description: Explicit reason why a solver run stopped.
